titleStmt.title: SII 24.90: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 90. (A.R. No. 26 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Seems to record a grant of tax-free land by purchase by the king who bears the title Śuṅgantavirtta on the day of Pūśam, the day of his accession. The record is dated in the 40th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻi lāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri A
yiṟ munaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannila
mayun=taviravantu punitaṟṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭittannaṭi Iraṇṭun=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ven=tar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kali yāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilavi
ḷākam tu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattup pūpar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat tan ponnakar puṟatti
ṭaikkiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻai Entuñ colletir koṭiṟ ṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu vi
ṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅkiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta netikaḷum cuḻan ṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷu n=talaivirittalamarak kuṭa ticait tannāṭukantu tānun=tānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutuku payantetir māṟi Aiyappe
run tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭan=ta yariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaikkaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pā
ṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparikkulaṅkaḷunRead ºttalaṅcuḷuntantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal paṭarvatu pol tan peruñcenai Evip pañcavaraivarum poru
ta porkkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavartammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpa
muttamiṭ potiyilu mattaveṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭa ruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellā n=tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutaniṟṟalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭ
paṭa neritoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiralkoḷ simhāsanantiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramu ntiyākamum viḷaṅka pārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyena tiyākavalli Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m vīrasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna tripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ coḻatevarku yāṇṭu 40 cuṅkantavittaruḷina tripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ kolot tuṅka coḻatevar tirupūcatti
nāḷ tiruvaraṅkattāḻvānukku (1/2)baśāṟu kalacan tirumañcaṉam ceytaruḷi tūṇippatakku Appamutu ceytaruḷukaikku veṇṭiya nitta nimantaṅ kaḷukku Iṟuppatāka yāṇṭu 10
mutal tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyiṭṭa devar devatānamāna vatu mutal tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyiṭṭa nilattukkut talaimāṟu It tevatānam Ulakamuḻutuṭai vaḷanāṭṭu kalārkkūṟṟattu
ciṟutavūril tiṟappāka vāṅkina nilam 100 3 10 m mmal kāṇi 1 kaṭan ḷar� pu� Itu Iṟai kaṭṭi Ippaṭi curuṅka munpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa ṇāl 10 1 ¢ Ākki ḷa 1 ¢¢¢ �¿ ḷa 7 2 10 sanicca yitta ḷa 7 ¥¥10 Uḷ � Eḻunūttu Irupatti
yāṇṭu 4 10 Āvatu mutal tevatānam Iṟai yiliyiṭṭamaikku puravari tinaikkaḷanāyakam koṭṭūruṭaiyānum ṭaiyānum puravari tinaikkaḷanāyakam vanum
puravari tinaikkaḷanāyakan nāṅkoṟṟanum puravari tinaikkaḷa veṭṭi veṇkuḷappākkiḻānum puravari tiṉaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi veṇkuḷappākkiḻā num puravari tinaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi pū pura vari ti
naikaḷattu mukaveṭṭi kaḻumarutaṅkiḻānum Eḻuttiṭṭa ppaṭi kalveṭṭuka Enṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷi tirumantiravolai tirumukap
paṭi kalveṭṭi vitta Ikkoyil cikāriyam ceykiṟa nāṭṭu tiruvā rūr kūṟṟattu vellūr kāśyapan vayiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
